name: Netflix, Inc.
description: Netflix, Inc. is a leading global entertainment service that provides a vast library of TV series, films, games, and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Founded in 1997 and headquartered in Los Gatos, California, the company revolutionized the media industry by offering members the ability to stream content on-demand, anytime and anywhere. With a focus on original content production and international expansion, Netflix continues to shape the digital entertainment landscape, delivering personalized experiences to millions of subscribers worldwide while constantly innovating its platform to meet evolving viewer preferences.
